name: Ria Money Transfer - Cardenas
description_short: Ria Money Transfer operates at Cardenas Markets locations, offering international money transfers, check cashing, bill payments, and money orders without requiring a bank account.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance provider that has partnered with Cardenas Markets and other Heritage Grocers Group locations (65+ stores across California, Arizona, and Nevada) to offer financial services at the point of retail. The company has 35+ years of experience and serves over 100 million customers worldwide, establishing itself as a trusted name in cross-border money movement.

At Cardenas Markets, Ria provides a comprehensive suite of financial services including international money transfers to 190+ countries, check cashing without bank account requirements, bill payment services (phone, water, electricity), money orders (up to ten at a time), and mobile top-ups. Their money transfer network includes 600,000+ pickup locations globally and partnerships with major institutions in key corridors like Mexico (55,000+ locations, BBVA, Banco Azteca, Oxxo), El Salvador (DaviPlata), and Honduras (9,000+ cash pickups, Banco Atlántida, Ficohsa).

Ria differentiates itself through competitive rates, promotional discounts (currently offering 50% off transfer fees with code HCGWB2), extensive destination country coverage (100+ currencies supported), and the convenience of in-store transactions at grocery locations where customers already shop. Their security measures and long operational history provide reassurance for customers sending remittances to family and friends abroad.

For consumers, Ria at Cardenas Markets is most valuable as a no-frills, in-person alternative for check cashing and international remittances, particularly those sending to Latin America and beyond without traditional bank accounts. However, customers should compare rates with online-only competitors, as in-store convenience typically comes with higher fees than digital-only providers.
address: 320 N Capitol Ave, San Jose, CA 95127

company_info.headquarters: 320 N Capitol Ave, San Jose, CA 95127

pros: 600,000+ pickup locations in 190+ countries enables recipients to access funds globally
Check cashing available without bank account requirement
Partnerships with major regional banks in Mexico, El Salvador, and Honduras for direct deposit options
Multiple sending methods: in-person, online, mobile app, WhatsApp, and in-store at Cardenas
Multiple receiving options: cash pickup, bank deposit, digital wallets, home delivery, ATM withdrawal
Current promotional offer of 50% fee discount with code HCGWB2
Convenient in-store locations at 65+ Cardenas Markets across CA, AZ, NV for local access
cons: Limited physical locations (only 65+ Cardenas/Los Altos stores) compared to standalone money transfer chains
No specific fee or exchange rate information disclosed on the website, requiring in-store inquiry
Likely more expensive than online-only money transfer providers like Wise or OFX due to brick-and-mortar overhead
Website does not disclose transfer speed specifics (e.g., same-day vs. 1-2 business days)
Limited to Heritage Grocers Group partner stores—not available at all retail locations
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers in CA, AZ, NV who need check cashing and don't have bank accounts
Latin American immigrants sending remittances to Mexico, El Salvador, Honduras, and Central America
Cardenas Markets shoppers who want to combine groceries with financial services in one trip
Consumers prioritizing in-person service and human interaction over online money transfers
diagnosis: Ria at Cardenas Markets is best for unbanked/underbanked Latino consumers in the Southwest who need convenient check cashing and remittance services at grocery store locations. The main caveat is that convenience comes at higher cost than online competitors, and service is limited to 65+ specific store locations rather than broader accessibility.
services: International money transfers to 190+ countries and territories
Money orders (up to 10 at a time)
Bill payments (phone, water, electricity, and more)
In-person cash pickup at partner locations
Bank deposit transfers to partner financial institutions
meta_description: Ria Money Transfer at Cardenas Markets offers international money transfers, check cashing, bill payments, and money orders.
